basics.name: Vadim Nicolai
basics.label: Senior Full Stack Engineer
basics.summary: Senior Full Stack Engineer with 12+ years of experience building scalable web applications using React, TypeScript, Go, and Rust. Expert in modern frontend architectures, microservices, GraphQL APIs, and performance-critical systems. Delivering 5 AI-powered projects with multi-model LLM orchestration, agentic pipelines, RAG search, eval-driven development, and production observability. Domain expertise in E-commerce, FinTech, AI/ML, and enterprise SaaS.
basics.keySkills: React • TypeScript • JavaScript • Next.js • Node.js • Go • Rust • GraphQL • Apollo • REST API • Microservices • gRPC • AWS • Cloudflare • MongoDB • DynamoDB • Docker • CI/CD • Jest • Git • AI/LLM Orchestration

work.name: Vitrifi
work.summary:
• Architected micro-frontend portal using Go microservices with gRPC and OpenAPI, integrating shared React components across multiple teams.
  • Led API migration from REST to GraphQL, implementing Apollo Server in Go and Apollo Client in React, reducing over-fetching and improving performance.
  • Drove frontend architecture and technical leadership across teams, establishing design patterns and enforcing quality through PR reviews.
  • Migrated monorepo from npm to PNPM with Turborepo caching, reducing CI/CD build times.
  • Integration testing strategy with Jest and React Testing Library, automated in CI/CD.
  • Tech stack: Go, Echo, gRPC, GraphQL, Apollo Server, OpenAPI, React, TypeScript, Apollo Client, React Query, Ant Design, Turborepo, PNPM, MongoDB, Jest, React Testing Library

aiProjects.name: Agentic Lead Gen
aiProjects.description: Autonomous B2B lead-gen platform where deterministic Rust/TypeScript ML displaces LLM calls on the hot path. A 5-stage agentic pipeline (Discovery → Enrichment → Contact Hunter ∥ QA Auditor → Outreach with plan-approval gate) drives 67 LangGraph graphs across three Cloudflare Workers Containers backends with AsyncPostgresSaver checkpoints on Neon, fronted by Apollo Server 5 + Drizzle.
highlights: Apollo Server 5 + Drizzle over Neon: 20+ resolvers, 18 DataLoaders, a 2 ms setTimeout scheduler that 5-10× batch fattens list pages, admin-guarded mutations.
67 LangGraph graphs (58 core + 7 research + 2 ML) ship the same Python in dev and on Cloudflare Workers Containers, threading state through Neon via AsyncPostgresSaver.
Routes DeepSeek cheap-first across one TS and one Python hub: v4-flash for summaries, v4-pro reasoner with reasoning_effort=high for ICP, pricing, GTM, and email composition.

Hawkes self-exciting lead temperature drops nightly recompute from O(n²) to O(n) via a recursive carried-sum, swapping per-event Math.exp for a 1024-entry Float32Array LUT and emitting heating / cooling / hot / cold trend labels.

Send-time optimizer maintains 168 Beta posteriors (DOW × hour) packed in one Float64Array, draws via hand-rolled Marsaglia-Tsang gamma + Box-Muller, and reuses a 168-byte business-hour mask + 24×27 timezone table so 10 k recipients share one sample sweep.

Scores engagement sub-millisecond with a 12-feature gradient-boosted decision-stump ensemble — 2048-entry sigmoid LUT, ~20 quantile splits per feature — paired with a Kaplan-Meier product-limit estimator that picks the next follow-up day in [2, 14] once incremental hazard beats the annoyance penalty.
Classifies companies in a single O(n + m + z) Aho-Corasick pass with BFS-built failure links, retiring an O(n × k) substring scan and an LLM call from the hot path.

Candle/Metal embed-server (BGE-small-en-v1.5, 384-dim) sits behind a Float32Array arena pool with a WASM transformers fallback for serverless — zero outbound embedding calls, persisted to pgvector HNSW.
Contact-tier LoRA (Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct, Q4_K_M GGUF, llama-cpp on a free HuggingFace Space) gates behind authority_score ≥ 0.5, cutting compute ~10× by only scoring qualified contacts.

Bidirectional email layer threads Resend outbound via In-Reply-To + References, HMAC-SHA256-verifies inbound webhooks inline with constant-time compare and a 300 s replay window, and onboards new contacts on a single MX catch-all alias — zero DNS per recipient.

8-rule strategy enforcer runs static checks on every change — eval ≥ 80 %, BLOCKING grounding on un-schema'd LLM calls, taxonomy validation, cost-aware routing, codegen, observability, HITL gates, and evidence on every persisted AI decision.

aiProjects.name: ResearchThera.com
aiProjects.description: Therapeutic and clinical-intelligence platform for families: a 5-stage LlamaIndex blood-marker chat pipeline runs triage → re-triage → route → ContextChatEngine → safety guard over 9 clinical intents and 8 pgvector indices, while 24 specialized LangGraph workflows handle medication deep-research, regimen interaction screens, iatrogenic-first psych screening, deep issue analysis, and academic therapy-paper retrieval. ~90-table Drizzle/Postgres schema; FastEmbed bge-large-en-v1.5 (1024-dim ONNX) on the local hot path; DeepSeek chat + reasoner for synthesis.
highlights: 5-stage LlamaIndex clinical chat (no LangGraph): triage → re-triage at confidence < 0.7 (max 2) → route → ContextChatEngine with similarity + clinical-relevance reranker → safety auditor with one resynthesis retry.

9 clinical intents (markers, ratios, trajectory, conditions, medications, symptoms, appointments, general health, safety refusal); multi-intent queries fan out across CompositeRetriever with confidence-scaled k (≥0.8 base, ≥0.6 ×1.5, else ×2).

Computes 7 peer-reviewed ratios per blood test — TG/HDL (McLaughlin), TC/HDL (Castelli), HDL/LDL (Millán), NLR (Fest), De Ritis AST/ALT, BUN/Creatinine (Hosten), TyG (Simental-Mendía) — each tagged optimal/borderline/elevated against authored thresholds.

3-tier Romanian-aware lab-PDF parser (HTML tables → FormKeysValues → free-text) feeds a LlamaIndex IngestionPipeline that emits per-test, per-marker, and health-state nodes with embedded derived metrics.

Hybrid FTS-plus-1024-dim-vector retriever on the blood-marker index, plus seven additional vector retrievers covering tests, health states, conditions, medications, symptoms, appointments, and allergies — each pluggable as a LlamaIndex BaseRetriever.

Medication deep-research graph fans out DailyMed SPL + openFDA labels + RxNav interactions, extracts indications / dosing / pharmacology / adverse events / interactions via DeepSeek JSON, and upserts into 6 pharmacology tables with a 30-day drug-slug cache.

Regimen interaction screen detects pairwise drug interactions and ATC-level-3 duplicate-therapy clusters across the active regimen, then synthesizes a clinician-readable severity report (none / low / moderate / high) with flagged combinations.

Therapy-research graph (loadContext → normalizeGoal → planQuery → search → enrichAbstracts → extractAll → persist) pulls ~2,350 candidates from OpenAlex, Crossref, and Semantic Scholar, gates at relevance ≥ 0.75 + confidence ≥ 0.55 + blended ≥ 0.72, persists top 20 as 1024-dim pgvectors.

Iatrogenic-first psychologist-screening graph spans 9 clinical tables, applies a Singulair washout-window classifier (acute / subacute / resolution / persistent), and runs a critique-and-refine loop that rewrites any axis scoring < 7/10.

Apollo Server 5 over Neon Postgres exposes 217 type resolvers; 2 Vercel-AI-SDK agents (storyTeller for 3-part CYOA, therapeutic for CBT/ACT/DBT/MBSR) emit Zod-validated objects and stream finished audio to Cloudflare R2.

volunteer.summary:
• Contributed 100+ pull requests to core trading engine and exchange connectivity modules in Rust and Python.
  • Built production exchange adapters for dYdX v4 and Hyperliquid with REST, WebSocket, gRPC, authentication, rate limiting, and execution clients.
  • Enhanced OKX and Kraken integrations with historical data support, pagination, and WebSocket reliability improvements.
  • Implemented high-performance technical indicators in Rust with Python/Cython parity, improving PnL calculations and monetary precision.
